ogTitle: Ingleburn vs Innes View: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ingleburn and Innes View.
heading: Ingleburn vs Innes View — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ingleburn, New South Wales and Innes View, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ingleburn has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Innes View (48/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ingleburn or Innes View safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ingleburn has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Innes View scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ingleburn scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Innes View scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ingleburn or Innes View?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ingleburn has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
